name: closed loop step conformance-report includes the rules promoted in the loop
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro active-rules && printf 'sources: [owasp-asvs]
' > .claude-tdd-pro/active-standards.yaml && printf 'rule_id: owasp-asvs-5-2-5
provenance: [{class: published-standard, source_id: owasp-asvs, section_id: 5.2.5}]
' > active-rules/owasp-asvs-5-2-5.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step conformance-report --active .claude-tdd-pro/active-standards.yaml --rules-dir active-rules --out STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md 2>err.txt && grep -q 'rule_id: owasp-asvs-5-2-5' STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md && echo ok 1>&2
